auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HeyGen API key sent with the X-Api-Key header. Create or view API keys in HeyGen API settings.

actions.name: delete_asset
actions.description: Delete a HeyGen asset that is no longer needed.

assetId.description: The HeyGen asset ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a HeyGen asset.

deleted.description: Whether HeyGen accepted the asset deletion request.

anyOf.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for deleting a HeyGen asset.

actions.name: delete_video
actions.description: Delete a generated or translated HeyGen video that is no longer needed.

videoId.description: The HeyGen video ID to delete.

type.description: The video category, either heygen_video or video_translate.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a HeyGen video.

videoId.description: The HeyGen video ID requested for deletion.

deleted.description: Whether HeyGen reported the video as deleted.

deletedVideoIds.description: The video IDs HeyGen reported as successfully deleted.

failedVideoIds.description: The video IDs HeyGen reported as failed.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for deleting a HeyGen video.

actions.name: generate_template_video
actions.description: Start an asynchronous HeyGen template video generation job with explicit template variables.

templateId.description: The HeyGen template ID to generate from.

additionalProperties.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

variables.description: Template variables keyed by the exact variable names returned by the template detail endpoint.

title.description: The optional title for the generated video.

test.description: Whether HeyGen should run the request in test mode.

caption.description: Whether HeyGen should add captions to the video.

width.description: The output video width in pixels.

height.description: The output video height in pixels.

includeGif.description: Whether to include a GIF preview URL in the webhook response.

enableSharing.description: Whether to make the video publicly shareable immediately after creation.

folderId.description: The HeyGen folder ID where the video should be stored.

brandVoiceId.description: The Brand Glossary ID used for translation and pronunciation rules.

callbackUrl.description: The URL HeyGen should notify when video rendering is complete.

keepTextVerticallyCentered.description: Whether replaced text elements should be vertically centered.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for generating a HeyGen video from a template.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for a HeyGen video generation request.

actions.name: generate_video
actions.description: Start an asynchronous HeyGen avatar video generation job and return the generated video ID.

type.description: The character type, either avatar or talking_photo.

avatarId.description: The HeyGen avatar ID to use for this scene.

avatarStyle.description: The avatar rendering style, such as normal.

talkingPhotoId.description: The HeyGen talking photo ID to use for this scene.

scale.description: The optional character scale for this scene.

character.description: The character configuration for a HeyGen video scene.

type.description: The voice input type, either text or audio.

voiceId.description: The HeyGen voice ID to use for narration.

inputText.description: The text that HeyGen should synthesize.

audioUrl.description: The audio URL to use when the voice type is audio.

audioAssetId.description: The uploaded audio asset ID to use when the voice type is audio.

voice.description: The voice or audio configuration for a HeyGen video scene.

type.description: The background type: color, image, or video.

value.description: The hex color value when the background type is color.

url.description: The background image or video URL.

imageAssetId.description: The uploaded image asset ID for image backgrounds.

videoAssetId.description: The uploaded video asset ID for video backgrounds.

fit.description: How the background media should fit the scene.

background.description: The optional background configuration for a HeyGen video scene.

items.description: One scene input for HeyGen video generation.

videoInputs.description: The scenes to generate into a video.

title.description: The optional title for the generated video.

test.description: Whether HeyGen should run the request in test mode.

caption.description: Whether HeyGen should add captions to the video.

callbackId.description: An optional callback identifier returned in webhooks.

callbackUrl.description: The URL HeyGen should notify when video rendering is complete.

aspectRatio.description: The target aspect ratio, such as 16:9 or 9:16.

width.description: The output video width in pixels.

height.description: The output video height in pixels.

folderId.description: The HeyGen folder ID where the video should be stored.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for generating a HeyGen video.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for a HeyGen video generation request.

actions.name: get_avatar
actions.description: Retrieve details for a single HeyGen avatar by avatar ID.

avatarId.description: The unique HeyGen avatar ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a HeyGen avatar.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for this HeyGen avatar action.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve profile information for the HeyGen account associated with the API key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for this HeyGen user action.

actions.name: get_remaining_quota
actions.description: Retrieve the remaining generation quota for the authenticated HeyGen account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for this HeyGen quota action.

actions.name: get_shareable_video_url
actions.description: Retrieve a public share URL for a rendered HeyGen video by video ID.

videoId.description: The HeyGen video ID returned by a generation request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a HeyGen video resource.

anyOf.description: The public HeyGen share URL when available.

raw.description: The raw HeyGen response data value.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for retrieving a HeyGen shareable video URL.

actions.name: get_template
actions.description: Retrieve variable definitions and metadata for a single HeyGen template.

templateId.description: The unique HeyGen template ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a HeyGen template.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for this HeyGen template action.

actions.name: get_video_status
actions.description: Retrieve processing status and download URLs for a HeyGen video by video ID.

videoId.description: The HeyGen video ID returned by a generation request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a HeyGen video resource.

anyOf.description: The HeyGen video ID when returned by the API.
The current processing status of the video.
The rendered video URL when available.
The rendered video thumbnail URL when available.
The rendered video duration when available.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for retrieving HeyGen video status.

actions.name: list_assets
actions.description: List uploaded HeyGen image, video, and audio assets so they can be reused in video generation.

limit.description: The maximum number of assets to return, from 0 to 100. Use 0 to request no assets, or omit this field to use HeyGen's server default.

token.description: The pagination token returned by a previous request.

fileType.description: The asset type to list: image, video, or audio.

folderId.description: The HeyGen folder ID to list assets from.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HeyGen assets.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

assets.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

anyOf.description: The total asset count when HeyGen includes it, otherwise null.
The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen assets.

actions.name: list_avatars
actions.description: List HeyGen avatars and talking photos available for video generation.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

avatars.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

talkingPhotos.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen avatars.

actions.name: list_folders
actions.description: List HeyGen folders and folder IDs that can be used with HeyGen video generation inputs.

limit.description: The maximum number of folders to return, from 0 to 100.

parentId.description: The parent folder ID to filter by.

nameFilter.description: The full or partial folder name to search for.

isTrash.description: Whether to list folders in the trash.

token.description: The pagination token returned by a previous request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HeyGen folders.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

folders.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

anyOf.description: The total folder count when HeyGen includes it, otherwise null.
The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen folders.

actions.name: list_templates
actions.description: List HeyGen templates created under the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

templates.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen templates.

actions.name: list_videos
actions.description: List generated HeyGen videos for historical result management.

limit.description: The maximum number of videos to return, from 0 to 100.

token.description: The pagination token returned by a previous request.

folderId.description: The HeyGen folder ID to list videos from.

title.description: The video title to search for.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HeyGen videos.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

videos.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

anyOf.description: The total video count when HeyGen includes it, otherwise null.
The pagination token for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen videos.

actions.name: list_voices
actions.description: List HeyGen voices available for video narration.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

voices.description: The list of raw objects returned by the HeyGen API.

anyOf.description: The total voice count when HeyGen includes it, otherwise null.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for listing HeyGen voices.

actions.name: upload_asset
actions.description: Upload an image, video, or audio file to HeyGen and return an asset ID usable in video generation.

contentBase64.description: The media file content encoded as a Base64 string.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the media file to upload.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a HeyGen media asset.

anyOf.description: The value returned by HeyGen, or null when unavailable.

asset.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

raw.description: The raw object returned by the HeyGen API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output for uploading a HeyGen asset.
